rules: Capture proof before writeback; importable text is only a format check.
Each platform needs six evidence checks before status can become set/live.
Use screenshot, clicked public link, screen recording, or platform timestamp as proof.
Keep the proof note tied to platform and date; do not use generic notes like done or checked.
After all three writebacks, rerun daily ops refresh, profile completion gate, and launch quickstart.

platforms.label: YouTube Shorts
platforms.stopCondition: Stop if account/profile is not visibly LoveTypes, edit permission is missing, /start/ UTM is changed, or Bio copy adds paid/diagnosis claims.

evidenceSteps.expectedValue: The correct platform account/profile page is visible before editing.
evidenceSteps.notes: profile link 已實際貼到平台個人頁或說明欄。

evidenceSteps.expectedValue: The platform profile, website field, description, or pinned comment visibly contains the tracked /start/ link.
evidenceSteps.notes: Link location: Channel description / video description; URL: https://lovetypes.tw/start/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=social_profile&utm_campaign=first_round_quiz_completion&utm_content=youtube_shorts_bio

evidenceSteps.expectedValue: Clicking or copying the platform link reaches https://lovetypes.tw/start/ without 404.
evidenceSteps.notes: 從平台畫面點擊或複製連結後，仍可抵達 https://lovetypes.tw/start/。

evidenceSteps.expectedValue: utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign, and utm_content are still present after platform handling.
evidenceSteps.notes: UTM source / medium / campaign / content 沒有被平台移除或改寫。

evidenceSteps.expectedValue: Bio/comment copy only promotes the 15-question guardian quiz; no Luna, affiliate, paid, diagnosis, or treatment promise.
evidenceSteps.notes: Bio 與置頂留言只導向 15 題測驗，沒有導購、療效或診斷承諾。

evidenceSteps.expectedValue: A traceable proof note exists, such as screenshot filename, public clicked URL, or screen recording filename.
evidenceSteps.notes: 留下可追溯 proof note，例如平台、設定時間、截圖檔名或手動驗證紀錄。
